note: Tier sets the budget. Never spawn below the party's weight class. Solo T1s do not appear.

T1.label: Mook
T1.notes: Fixed 8 HP — general T1s are uniform. Only as fodder alongside higher tiers now

T2.label: Professional
T2.notes: Default threat. Fixed 14 HP — general T2s are uniform (a named 'major' gets ×1.8). May carry shield (negate 1st hit); come in 2-4s

T3.label: Elite/Boss
T3.notes: Fixed 24 HP — general T3s are uniform (a named 'major' gets ×1.8). Shields, coordination, morale DC 16. May attack twice.

rampRule.note: New threat tiers introduce gradually. First encounter with a new tier is 1-2 ships; full groups (3+) only after the player has faced the tier once.

critRules.enemy: max damage only, no bonus roll
